name: Fettuccine & Vegetables in a Garlic-Mint Sauc
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the celery and carrots in a large pan of water. Bring to a boil, then add the fettuccine and salt. Cook until al dente.
2. Drain the pasta. Meanwhile, warm the garlic in the olive oil over low heat until fragrant and slightly golden.
3. Remove from the heat and stir in the mint leaves, pepper, and extra salt to taste.
4. Toss the cooked pasta and vegetables with the garlic-mint sauce and serve immediately.
